cards.back: Techniques used to identify and reduce bias in AI models, such as data auditing and fairness metrics.
Tools and methods used to measure and evaluate the fairness of AI models, such as demographic parity and equalized odds.
Techniques used to provide insights into AI decision-making processes, such as feature attribution and model interpretability.
Processes used to review and validate AI decisions, such as human-in-the-loop and human-on-the-loop.
Processes used to evaluate and address AI system failures, such as incident reporting and system review.
